zh.Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, Fra: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉可尼利艾
zh.Cornouaille, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne,: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉
zh.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Benedict Budic VIII於0967年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille38歲，母親Alava de Cornouaille55歲。他和Guinodeon de Vannes至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1026年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉享年59歲，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

zh-hans.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benedict Budic VIII于0967年出生在法国布列塔尼时，他的父亲Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille38岁，母亲Alava de Cornouaille55岁。他和Guinodeon de Vannes至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1026年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉享年59岁，埋葬在瑞士瓦特利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: Budic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Kurt, Otto.

Germanized form of Sorbian Budych, Budich, and Budik, Czech Budík: from a pet form of a personal name, such as Lower Sorbian Budysław, Upper Sorbian Budisław, based on the Old Slavic element bud ‘to inspire’ (see Budish ).

variants.name: Budish
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Budiš, Polish Budzisz: from a pet form of any of Slavic compound personal names based on the element bud ‘to inspire’ (from Old Slavic buditi), e.g. Budislav (Polish Budzisław) ‘inspiring glory’.

nameMeanings.name: Benedict
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

en.lifeSummary: When Benedict Budic VIII was born in 0967, in Brittany, France, his father, Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille, was 38 and his mother, Alava de Cornouaille, was 55. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Guinodeon de Vannes. He died in 1026, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in L'Abbaye, Vaud, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benedict Budic VIII est né en 0967, à Bretagne, France, son père, Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alava de Cornouaille, avait 55 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Guinodeon de Vannes. Il est décédé en 1026, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benedict Budic VIII 0967 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille 38 und seine Mutter Alava de Cornouaille 55. Er hatte mit Guinodeon de Vannes mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1026 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in L'Abbaye, Waadt, Schweiz begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benedict Budic VIII è nato il nel 0967 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Alava de Cornouaille, aveva 55 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Guinodeon de Vannes. Morì nel 1026, nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a L'Abbaye, Vaud, Svizzera.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Cornillé, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, Fra: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインコルニルe
ja.Cornouaille, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne,: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアイン
ja.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズ
ja.L'Abbaye, Vaud, Switzerland: スイスヴァウドル'アッバイ
ja.lifeSummary: Benedict Budic VIIIが0967年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Binidic Castellin de Cournouailleは38歳，母Alava de Cornouailleは55歳であった。彼はGuinodeon de Vannesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1026年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインで59歳で死去し，スイスヴァウドル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benedict Budic VIII(이)가 0967년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alava de Cornouaille(은)는 55세였다. 그는 Guinodeon de Vannes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1026년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 바드 '압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benedict Budic VIII nasceu em 0967, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alava de Cornouaille, tinha 55 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Guinodeon de Vannes. Ele faleceu em 1026, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benedict Budic VIII родился в 0967 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alava de Cornouaille, 55. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Guinodeon de Vannes. Он умер в 1026 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности л'аббеи, вауд, Швейцария.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benedict Budic VIII nació en 0967, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Binidic Castellin de Cournouaille, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Alava de Cornouaille, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Guinodeon de Vannes. Murió en 1026, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en L'Abbaye, Vaud, Suiza.
